title: CSP: `*.x.y` must match a host that ends with `.x.y` (4.2.2 step 4.6)
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
  
Given a CSP header of `script-src \*.a.localhost`, the script `<script src="//a.localhost/script.js"></script>` should not be loaded. CSP spec section 4.2.2 step 4.6 states "If the first character of the source expression’s host-part is an U+002A ASTERISK character (\
